tool_input.command: cd /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work2/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge && cat component/libraries/libraries-data-bind.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f's{s[\"id\"]}: {s[\"title\"][:80] if s.get(\"title\") else \"(no title)\"}') for s in d['sections']]" 2>/dev/null || echo "Error"
